reviews.comment:
Llegamos a cargar combustible, pedí para los sanitarios me mandó donde estaba afuera del autoservicio,, horrible, sucios los baños, cuando entre a comprar la señora que atendía me dijo que los baños del local eran para los clientes no los de afuera, preguntar y que te toque el playero buena onda que te mandé adentro

(Translated by Google)
We arrived to fill up with gas, I asked for the restrooms and they sent me to the one outside the drive-thru...horrible, the restrooms were filthy. When I went inside to buy gas, the woman working there told me that the restrooms inside the station were for customers, not the ones outside. Ask around and hope you get the nice attendant who sent you inside.

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención. Se negaron a limpiarme el parabrisas incluso pidiéndolo; me mandaron a que lo haga yo. Lo peor es que al rato vi que a otro auto sí se lo limpiaban (el playero tenía chaleco de Socios). Viajo por toda Argentina y nunca vi esto en ninguna YPF. Una vergüenza, no tiene nada que ver con el estándar de la empresa.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. They refused to clean my windshield even after I asked; they told me to do it myself. The worst part is that a little while later I saw them cleaning another car's windshield (the attendant was wearing a vest with the company logo). I travel all over Argentina and I've never seen anything like this at any YPF station. It's a disgrace; it's completely unacceptable for the company.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/150634493343004521/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pGT01HbFNZamRQTjFwdGExQnFaa1k1VkhSalIwRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar muy tranquilo para descansar. tiene un pequeño estacionamiento y un lugar verde para tirar carpa. La gente del pueblo muy amable y no hacen ruido a la noche.

(Translated by Google)
A very peaceful place to relax. It has a small parking area and a grassy area for pitching a tent. The locals are very friendly and don't make any noise at night.

reviewReply.comment: muchas gracias por su calificacion y su comentario lo esperamos pronto.saludos
